title: From Submission to Action: Mastering monday forms

posts.author: Fanny (Fanny Zamora)
posts.cookedHtml:
From project requests to event registrations, collecting the right information is key. In this webinar, you’ll learn how to build and customize monday forms so every submission flows directly into your boards. You’ll leave knowing how to structure intake, save time, and keep work moving.
What you’ll learn:
How to create and share a form in minutes
Core features: question types, required fields, branding & design options
Advanced capabilities: conditional logic and permissions
Tips for automating intake and approvals
Agenda:
Introduction to forms
Building your first form step by step
Customization and design options
Advanced settings and features (conditional logic, mandatory fields, etc)
Real-world use cases & best practices
Q&A
